## Agent Framework

e.g., Claude Code, Cursor, Aider, OpenClaw

## Use Case

How would you use zhuge-loop with this framework?

## Proposed Integration

How should the integration work? (e.g., phase commands, environment variables, config format)

## Example Command

What would the phase command look like?

```bash
# e.g., claude --agent zhaoyun -p "implement next slice"
```
